name: elemental-fire-node
summary: A pocket of the Elemental Plane of Fire. Lava vents pour from walls that are themselves burning, and the air shimmers with heat distortion. Stone floors are a polite fiction — most of the footing is cooled crust over flowing magma.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: irregular circular — the room is a cooled bubble in the magma

accent.purpose: glowing lava fissures through the crust

primary_palette.note: an eternal flame at the node's heart
efreeti holdfast — the brazier rules the room
a stand of burning columns, no obvious focus

story_prompts: an efreeti noble entertains a salamander envoy beside the grand brazier
the node is swelling — a material-plane volcano is about to erupt in sympathy
phoenix hatching in progress — the core pulses in a heartbeat rhythm
stolen — the core is gone, the room is cooling and going dark
cultists of Imix have chained a fire elemental to the central fountain

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright (0.55-0.7) with strong orange-red; the room IS light

anti_patterns: no wood, no fabric, no paper — everything that could burn has burned
don't use a cool or neutral ambient — if your screenshot isn't orange, it's wrong
walls are not polite — use trims and irregular edges to show melted rock
leave traversable crust paths between fissures or the room isn't playable
